subcodes.first_line: O leaf of certitude! In this divine Dispensation the bounties of God in regard to the handmaidens of the All-Merciful are manifest and evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه در این کور الهی الطاف حق در حق اماء الرحمن مشهود و واضح لهذا
subcodes.subjects: @role and station of women, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
